heading: Funding levels
label: 5641 Funding levels
notes: Amendments2018—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which related to funding for market access programs under and program priorities.Pub. L. 115–334section 5623 of this title2014—Subsec. (b). , amended subsec. (b) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec (b) related to credit guarantees under for fiscal years 1996 to 2012.Pub. L. 113–79, § 3101(b)section 5622(a) of this titleSubsec. children.heading: Direct credit programs
children.label: a Direct credit programs
children.text: The Commodity Credit Corporation may make available for each fiscal year such funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation as it determines necessary to carry out any direct credit program established under .section 5621 of this title

children.heading: Export credit guarantee program
children.label: b Export credit guarantee program
children.text: The Commodity Credit Corporation shall make available for each fiscal year $5,500,000,000 of credit guarantees under .section 5622(a) of this title
